title: erodium cicutarium subsp. bipinnatum
intro: Erodium cicutarium subsp. bipinnatum, also known as redstem storksbill, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the geranium family (Geraniaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Erodium cicutarium subsp. bipinnatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
